revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23989927232|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:Bīng (tiĕng-găng)]][[fr:Bing (tige céleste)]][[gan:丙]][[hak:Piáng (thiên-kôn)]][[ja:丙]][[ko:병 (천간)]][[vi:Bính]][[za:Bingj (diengan)]][[zh-classical:丙]][[zh-min-nan:Piáⁿ (Thian-kan)]][[zh-yue:丙]][[zh:丙]]
{{Ten Heavenly Stems and Earthly Branches}} '''Hinoe''' (丙) is the third of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}.<ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=2ccaa3dfb143cbd21a381fae3fe00a09d7a075499a7c22e867c63f8569c63c48JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuamFwYW5kaWN0LmNvbS8lRTQlQjglOTk&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=9153b751b77052472d4512917eb6676f3e00833c74869b3816122312110f93c3JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubmlob25nb21hc3Rlci5jb20vamFwYW5lc2UvZGljdGlvbmFyeS93b3JkLzU2MTcwL2hlaS1oaW5vZS0lRTQlQjglOTktJUUzJTgxJUI4JUUzJTgxJTg0LSVFMyU4MSVCMiVFMyU4MSVBRSVFMyU4MSU4OA&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=c68dcaf7ea672bb11d2136ae73ed9e7041f8b9ffcab125f3b3332d72df7f2e2bJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9lbnRyeV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9lbnRyeV9pZD01NjMyNCZlbGVtZW50X2lkPTcyNjM4&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=d2c696e5e718c899283c1c5d96e3dc3faf21f7cc1c1251a796a8af1b6ece9eb6JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGFub3NoaWlqYXBhbmVzZS5jb20vZGljdGlvbmFyeS9rYW5qaV9kZXRhaWxzLmNmbT9jaGFyYWN0ZXJfaWQ9MTk5OTMmaz0lRTQlQjglOTk&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=7637545e36c420976b60fa52e3093fc8785b3813e858ddaf8ac0803dd78bf90aJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qYXBhbmVzZS13b3Jkcy5vcmcvZW4va2Fuamkvdmlldy8yNDcw&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=67e4232d2e2ccc39345ab7fcdf841de14c3ca6f169aeddd033743f62fd9a0098JmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9qaXNoby5vcmcvc2VhcmNoLyVFNCVCOCU5OQ&ntb=1</ref><ref>https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=68a60a659f63da145bd8b79dc46adedbcb7a735fb0d6895ed9a37ec331ec5c6eJmltdHM9MTc0MzAzMzYwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=3e6f989f-7779-62d7-1cd7-8d247648633d&psq=Hinoe+(%e4%b8%99)+dictionary&u=a1aHR0cDovL3d3dy5yb21hamlkZXN1LmNvbS9kaWN0aW9uYXJ5L21lYW5pbmctb2YtJUUzJTgxJUIyJUUzJTgxJUFFJUUzJTgxJTg4Lmh0bWw&ntb=1</ref>
According to the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行説|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 陰陽五行思想}}, it is assigned to the '''Yang Fire''' element, which is why in Japan it is also called "hinoe" (火の兄, "Elder Brother of Fire").
== Pronunciations: 丙 (Stem 3) == * Chinese (Pinyin): Bǐng * Korean: Byeong (병) * Vietnamese: Bính * Japanese: ** On’yomi: Hei (へい) ** Kunyomi (elemental): Hinoe (ひのえ, 火の兄 – “Elder Fire”)
== Overview == * The character "丙" is an {{ill|Ideogram|ja|象形文字|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ideogram|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Hieroglyph|qid=Q193762}} representing a desk<ref>{{Citation journal| author=葛亮| year=2018| title=古文字“丙”與古器物“房”| journal=出土文献与古文字研究| volume=7| pages=50–71|qq=}}</ref>. Its use to denote the third position among the Ten Heavenly Stems is due to {{ill|Loan usage|ja|仮借|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Loan usage|1=Loangraph|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10888485}}. * Years ending in 6 in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} correspond to '''Hinoe years'''. Another term for such years is '''Jūchō''' (柔兆)<ref>{{Cite web |title=古代天干地支的别称及解释_书法欣赏_词典网 |url=https://www.cidianwang.com/shufazuopin/jiaocheng/932596.htm |website=www.cidianwang.com |access-date=2024-03-08|qq=}}</ref>. * In the Chinese {{ill|Chemical nomenclature|ja|化合物命名法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chemical nomenclature|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to IUPAC命名法|1=IUPAC nomenclature of chemistry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20826683}}, '''Hinoe''' is used to name compounds containing three carbon atoms, such as {{ill|Propane|en|Propane|qid=Q131189|lt=Propane|1=Propane}} and the {{ill|Propyl group|en|Propyl group|qid=Q898637|lt=Propyl group|1=Propyl group}}. * The opposite stem is {{ill|Shin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}}. * The '''Eho''' (lucky direction) associated with Hinoe is '''South-Southeast slightly to the south (165 degrees)'''.
== Sexagenary cycles containing Hinoe (丙) == {{wiktionary|丙}} {| class="wikitable alternance droite" |{{ill|Yang Fire Tiger|ja|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|zh|丙寅|1=Yang Fire Tiger|ko|병인|fr|Tigre de feu|de|Feuer-Tiger|en|Fire Tiger|lt=丙寅 (Yang Fire Tiger)|lt_ko=병인|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Tiger|qq=}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Fire Rat|ja|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|zh|1=Yang Fire Rat|2=ja|丙子|1=Yang Fire Rat|ko|병자|fr|Rat de feu|de|Feuer-Ratte|en|Fire Rat|lt=丙子 (Yang Fire Rat)|lt_ko=병자|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Fire Dog|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|zh|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|ko|병술|fr|Chien de feu|de|Feuer-Hund|en|Fire Dog|lt=丙戌 (Yang Fire Dog)|lt_ko=병술|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Fire Monkey|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|zh|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|ko|병신|fr|Singe de feu|de|Feuer-Affe|en|Fire Monkey|lt=丙申 (Yang Fire Monkey)|lt_ko=병신|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Fire Horse|en|Fire Horse|qid=Q1062045|lt=丙午 (Yang Fire Horse)|1=Yang Fire Horse}} |- style="text-align:left;font-size:100%" |{{ill|Yang Fire Dragon|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|zh|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|丙辰|1=Yang Fire Dragon|ko|병진|fr|Dragon de feu|de|Feuer-Drache|en|Fire Dragon|lt=丙辰 (Yang Fire Dragon)|lt_ko=병진|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} == See also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}
